error_signature: The value in response.videos[0].bytesBase64Encoded is not set
title: Base64 value not set in Convert to File node
symptom: The workflow fails with an error stating that the value in 'response.videos[0].bytesBase64Encoded' is not set when executing the Convert to File node.
not_this_if: The response is valid and contains the expected data
root_cause: The error occurs because the Convert to File node is attempting to convert a video file to binary format, but the expected base64-encoded value is missing from the response. This can happen if the file generation process has not completed or if the response structure is incorrect.
fix_steps: Add a check to verify if the file exists before the conversion step
Implement a conditional node to only proceed if the file is available
Adjust the workflow to handle cases where the file is not yet ready
agent_instruction: Check if the file exists before proceeding with the base64 conversion in the workflow.
